info.name: POS & E-commerce API Collection
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection containing all API endpoints for the POS & E-commerce Backend including User Authentication, Company Settings, Products, Variants, Categories, Brands, Cart, Wishlist, Orders, Slider, Homepage Sections, and Payments.
